Eufrocina's

A place carved from stone and built for stories.

View Menu Explore the Space

✦Unforgettable Atmosphere

Our Story

A café unlike
any other.

Eufrocina's is more than a place to eat — it's an experience. Inspired by natural cave formations, our space features sculptural stone mushroom pillars, cave-carved walls with glowing niches, and an open-air terrace that feels like dining under the stars.

From hearty Pinoy ulam to handcrafted specialty coffee and signature frappes, every item is made with the same care that went into designing our one-of-a-kind space.

Handcrafted Coffee
Lattes, matcha, frappes & refreshers
Pinoy Ulam
Comfort food with Filipino roots
Cave Architecture
Stone pillars & warm-lit niches
Al Fresco + Indoor
Open terrace & air-conditioned cave room
The open terrace⊕
Food & drinks⊕
The entrance⊕
Signature drinks⊕
Rice meals⊕

The Space

Tap any photo to view fullscreen. Every corner of Eufrocina's is designed to surprise — from the carved stone façade lit in gold, to the glowing cave niches and open-sky terrace inside.

Guest Experiences

Loved by those who visit

★★★★★

"The cave-like interior is unlike anything I've seen in Bulacan. The vibe alone is worth the visit — and the food doesn't disappoint either."

— Mariel R. · Google Reviews
★★★★★

"Came for the aesthetic, stayed for the Caramel Macchiato. The open terrace at night with those stone mushroom pillars is truly magical."

— Carlo T. · Facebook
★★★★★

"Best Ube Latte I've had. The cave room inside is super cozy for dates or barkada hangouts. Highly recommend!"

— Yna L. · TripAdvisor
